subject: feat(debug): circular buffer, console intercept, PWA tab, inline pill/styles
body:
Complete DEBUG_SYSTEM pattern sync. debugLog.ts: circular buffer replaces
Array.shift() O(n) with head/count O(1), console.error/warn intercepted
at module load, URL params redacted in reports, DebugSource accepts ad-hoc
strings, subscribers receive current entries immediately. DebugPill.vue:
all Tailwind replaced with inline styles (survives CSS load failure),
new PWA Diagnostics tab with active health checks (protocol, SW state,
manifest validation, standalone, install prompt). index.html: pre-framework
inline pill with error buffer, __debugPushError(), and 20-second loading
timeout. main.ts: bridges pre-mount errors and clears load timer on mount.
TypeScript clean, build verified.
